$comment: Entrant registry for seo-skill-bench. install: how the harness installs the skill into the run workspace. 'git-skill-md' = shallow-clone the GitHub repo and copy its SKILL.md/skills into .claude/skills/<id>/. 'skills-cli' = npx skills add <repo> --yes. 'npm' = npx -y <pkg> init --yes inside the workspace (never npm i -g). 'none' = baseline, nothing installed.

skills.name: Vanilla baseline (no skill)
skills.notes: Claude Code with no SEO skill installed. Any entrant must beat this to have positive value.

skills.name: SEOAgent
skills.notes: Maintained by the benchmark maintainer (SEOAgent). Conflict of interest disclosed in README.md and RUBRIC.md. Version PINNED per benchmark cycle for reproducibility (an unpinned npx latest resolved to a stale version mid-cycle once).
